title: [BTA] ReSteeled
description: Redoes the textures for nearly all Steel related blocks within Better Than Adventure.
body:
![ReSteeled Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1520c0ed123b2482608f03f6c5ca81fe7495eae.png)

I made this because I don't like any of the new Steel Block textures.
My issues overall are that they are too high in contrast, too dark, and the added color is ugly and makes it even more comparable to Netherite.
The blocks are currently, in my opinion, very unusable and they don't work with Basalt as much as they should because of the changes to the palette.
Those changes also make them not match the Steel parts of the "Reinforced" Piston, or the Steel Fence Texture I made that's currently in the game because I made it before the Steel block textures were settled on the ugly new ones. (lol)

I've included some pictures for comparison.

### Notable Changes
- Steel "Reinforced" Piston.
> - Made the base actually look like Polished Stone Bricks instead of the weird hybrid Stone-Metal that doesn't make any sense.
The shaft now has a spring texture because it looks nice and implies block functionality, boioioing.
The head now has spikes on it to imply the crushing potential of the piston, though it's very subtle.

- Steel Block.
> - Changed the border to be similar to other blocks of similar materials (Diamond, Gold, Iron.)
Gave it a more unique texture based on one of the first attempts at changing it, now it can be used to build vents ඞ or walls from Portal. (NO WAY PORTAL REFERENCE POG!!!)

- Steel Bricks.
> - Slightly reworked a texture I made in the past that conveniently shared pretty much the exact same idea.
I decided not to misalign the texture like the current one, doing so might make it look more "unique" and have its own applications but it just makes it look uglier when trying to build with it.

- Steel Trapdoor.
> - Reduced the insane amount of contrast it has.
Gave it a side texture that is consistent with the Iron Trapdoor one.
I would have given it a texture that matches the Steel Door I made, but I'm pretty sure people like having the option of a Trapdoor that looks like a grate.

- Steel Door
> - Originally I wasn't going to have that Valve on it because I didn't think I could make it look good, but I think it ended up looking too good to not keep.
The door now has hinges!! No way!!! Very notable change I'm sure.

- Crude Steel.
> - I made the texture that's currently in game, but was presented with the issue that with many of them and Steel Ingots in the same chest, it becomes very hard to make out which is which with the number covering a portion of the textures silhouette. SORRY MY FELLOW DYSLEXICS!!!
So now it looks like rods, inspired by what shows up on google images when you look up "Crude Steel."


If there are any issues or improvements you think could be made please tell me in the Discord Forum post, I might tweak these at some point regardless.

_To Install a Texture Pack for BTA simply drag and drop the .zip into your texturepacks folder :)_
